introSection: Gold Rush is a steel launched roller coaster located at Attractiepark Slagharen in Slagharen, Overijssel, Netherlands.

sections.title: History
sections.content: In August 2016, park director Wouter Dekkers revealed that a new Wild West themed roller coaster named Gold Rush would open in 2017. It replaced the park's Thunder Loop roller coaster, which closed in October 2016. Gold Rush opened on 13 April 2017.

sections.title: Design
sections.content:
Gold Rush is a Gerstlauer Infinity Coaster. It is tall and reaches a maximum speed of. While the total length of track is, the train travels approximately per ride cycle due to the forwards and backwards launches.

The theme is based on the California Gold Rush which began in 1848.

fullText:
Gold Rush is a steel launched roller coaster located at Attractiepark Slagharen in Slagharen, Overijssel, Netherlands.

In August 2016, park director Wouter Dekkers revealed that a new Wild West themed roller coaster named Gold Rush would open in 2017. It replaced the park's Thunder Loop roller coaster, which closed in October 2016. Gold Rush opened on 13 April 2017.

Gold Rush is a Gerstlauer Infinity Coaster. It is tall and reaches a maximum speed of. While the total length of track is, the train travels approximately per ride cycle due to the forwards and backwards launches.

The theme is based on the California Gold Rush which began in 1848.
